title: ESTRELLAS MECANICAS - La gran chispa Tournament
description:
"Step into the exciting universe of 'Estrellas Mecanicas - La gran chispa Tournament', a dynamic action game that masterfully fuses the adrenaline of classic side-scrolling beat 'em up games with the intensity and frenzy of platform shooters. Engage in intense arena combat against the cosmos' most formidable fighters, each with unique abilities.

Choose your warrior, master their special attacks and moves, and unleash your power on your way to the top.

But behind the shadows, a sinister entity known as 'Vortexia X' organizes this event with the intention of feeding its sinister plans by absorbing the negative voltage that emanates from the warriors as they fight.

Take control of the superheroes Steno and Cody on their mission to infiltrate the tournament, discover the truth, and put an end to this galactic threat before it's too late!"
description_short: Total action! Enjoy a dynamic beat 'em up with platform shooter elements in intense arena combat. Choose your warrior, master their special attacks, and unleash fast, fluid combos in this retro tournament to stop a galactic threat.
